_comment: Optional companion to aura.blueprint.json: after that blueprint has created the aura candidates and review spritesheet, animate the complete approved sheet as one transparent V3 canvas. This companion does not replace aura generation.

TASK.instruction: Before the PixelLab call, require explicit current-user approval for this additional animation job, confirm PIXELLAB_SECRET is available without printing or storing its value, copy the approved aura spritesheet into the declared new output directory as candidates.png without changing its pixels, and verify the input is at most 256 pixels on either axis. Stop before spending if approval, credentials, the input, the size limit, or the new empty output directory check fails.
TASK.verify: candidates.png is pixel-identical to the approved input, has transparency, is at most 256 pixels on either axis, and its width times height times 8 does not exceed 524288 pixels.

POST /v2/animate-with-text-v3.action: all aura effects animate in place within their original cells, preserving the spritesheet layout and transparent background

TASK.instruction: Save all nine returned images in API order as frame-00.png through frame-08.png, including the echoed source at frame 0. Assemble those frames without resizing or repainting into animation-frames.png as a three-column by three-row sheet and into animation.gif as a looping transparent preview.
TASK.verify: There are nine ordered transparent frames at the same dimensions as candidates.png, frame-00 matches candidates.png pixel-for-pixel in visible content, animation-frames.png contains the nine frames in row-major order, and animation.gif preserves their order and dimensions.
